hooks.command: SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; alerter --title "$TITLE" --message "Needs your attention" --app-icon ~/.claude/claude-logo.png; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

SESSION=$(tmux display-message -p '#{session_name}' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); TITLE="Claude Code${SESSION:+ [$SESSION]}"; alerter --title "$TITLE" --message "Done" --app-icon ~/.claude/claude-logo.png; afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Funk.aiff
